questions.text: What is the name of the school?
Who does Keza walk to school with?
How long does it take Keza to reach school?
What is Keza’s favourite subject?
Why does Keza like the subject?
Mention two things found at Keza’s school.
What does Keza do after lessons?
Do you enjoy playing with friends after school? Why?
Match the words with their meanings.

options.meaning: b. A person who treats sick people
a. A place where children learn
c. A place where people buy and sell things
e. A person who grows crops

questions.text: Fill in the blanks using the correct words from the box.

correctAnswers.blank: It is ____________ today. I can see the sun.
We carry umbrellas when it is ____________.

questions.text: Write the negative form of the following sentences.

correctAnswers.negative: They do not play football every day.
He does not walk to school.

questions.text: Write questions using the words given.
Fill in the blanks with the correct form of the verbs in brackets.
Choose the correct answer.

options.text: There ____ many books in the library.
I am going to ____ my grandmother.

questions.text: Mention four types of weather.
What do people wear when it is cold?
What was the weather like yesterday? Write one sentence.
Why is weather important?
Write five sentences about your school.
Write five sentences about what you did last weekend.
Write two ways you can help keep your school clean.
Write two qualities of a good friend.
Why is it important to come to school on time?
